schema.name: BitSightDiligenceHistoricalStatistics_CL
schema.description: The BitSightDiligenceHistoricalStatistics table contains historical diligence statistics per company over time from the BitSight API ingested into Microsoft Sentinel.

columns.name: RecordDate
columns.description: The date of the historical record (YYYY-MM-DD).

columns.name: Grade
columns.description: Letter grade for this record period.

columns.name: Counts
columns.description: Array of per-category count objects ({ count, category }). Expanded row-per-category at query time by the KQL parser via mv-expand.

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connection name identifier for multi-instance tracking.
